prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of QCOM (~25-30% annualized), the 20-day prediction incorporates typical daily price movements of 1.5-2%. The slight upward bias in the point estimate reflects QCOM's recent performance in the semiconductor sector and AI-related tailwinds. The confidence intervals are calculated using Monte Carlo simulation assuming log-normal price distribution with estimated drift and volatility parameters derived from historical data.
